summary: Prepares publication system for future visual support WITHOUT generating any visuals now.
subordination_invariant: visual support is and remains subordinate to operational readability and procedural clarity

supportive_visual_insertion.where: renderer attaches a visual asset reference to an entity at render time
supportive_visual_insertion.constraint: visual must not replace the procedural text; it augments only
supportive_visual_insertion.fallback: if visual asset missing, render proceeds with text; visual-need flag persists

procedural_visual_orchestration.where: multi-step procedures may receive a sequence-illustration asset
procedural_visual_orchestration.constraint: step text remains canonical; visual asset is annotated with step ids

hybrid_schematic_rendering.where: installation flows may receive a schematic alongside textual orientation

visual_assisted_onboarding.where: onboarding flows may receive UI screenshots for app-pairing steps

troubleshooting_visual_support.where: diagnostic decision trees may receive a flow diagram
troubleshooting_visual_support.constraint: decision text remains canonical; diagram is supplementary

ordering_rule_for_future_phase: do not generate visuals before audience-aware readability filtering is operational
do not generate visuals before drift-control detectors are wired
do not generate visuals before reviewer-validation console exists
